overview: The image features a Balanophora abbreviata, a parasitic plant that lacks chlorophyll and resembles a mushroom. It is known for growing in clusters and attracts insects like ants to its inflorescences. This plant belongs to the Balanophoraceae family. India Flora Online +1 2 sites Herbarium JCB Herbarium JCB. Balanophora abbreviata Blume. Family : BALANOPHORACEAE. (Balanophora Family). Family (Hindi name) : BALANOPHORA FAM...
